---
title: "Track A (multi-ROI): Multiple testing control (BH–FDR families)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose
Apply Benjamini–Hochberg FDR correction within pre-defined families aligned to hypotheses.

This step reads outputs from:
- Track A Step 02 (LME coupling): key terms + model tests
- Track A Step 03 (estimand engine): grid regression results

It then appends BH–FDR q-values for each family and writes FDR-enhanced tables.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(here)

source(here::here("R", "fdr_helpers_multiROI.R"))

in_dir  <- here::here("outputs", "trackA_multiROI")
out_dir <- in_dir

# ---- Inputs ----
lme_key   <- read_csv(file.path(in_dir, "trackA_lme_cwcpm_key_terms.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
lme_tests <- read_csv(file.path(in_dir, "trackA_lme_cwcpm_model_tests.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
est_grid  <- read_csv(file.path(in_dir, "trackA_estimand_engine_results.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- A) LME families (across ROIs) ----
lme_key_fdr   <- add_fdr_lme_key_terms(lme_key)
lme_tests_fdr <- add_fdr_lme_model_tests(lme_tests)

# ---- B) Estimand-engine families ----
# Apply BH within each (estimand × model × term) across ROIs
est_grid_fdr <- add_fdr_estimand_grid(est_grid)

# ---- Write ----
write_csv(lme_key_fdr,   file.path(out_dir, "trackA_lme_cwcpm_key_terms_FDR.csv"))
write_csv(lme_tests_fdr, file.path(out_dir, "trackA_lme_cwcpm_model_tests_FDR.csv"))
write_csv(est_grid_fdr,  file.path(out_dir, "trackA_estimand_engine_results_FDR.csv"))

# Quick peek
list(
  lme_key_fdr = head(lme_key_fdr),
  lme_tests_fdr = head(lme_tests_fdr),
  est_grid_fdr = head(est_grid_fdr)
)

```
